titleStmt.title: SII 32, appendix, no. 6: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 6. (A.R. No. B of 2003-04.) SEMBARAMPĀKKAM, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying in front of the Sakthīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kannaradēva, who took Kachchi and Tañjai Year 23: 962 A.D.

summary.p: This records the gift of 3000 kuḻi of land for beating drum thrice during the śrībali ceremony to the God of Saktīśvaram temple at Sembarambākkam in Puliyūrkōṭṭam by Nāgaipperumāṉ of Kuḷattūr, his brothers Niṟaikali and Sēndabhaṭṭaṉ. The ūrār of Sembarambākkam agreed to free the land from taxes. The priests of the temple, Sembūdikiḻava Ēḻuvāḍiyaṉ, his brother Kōmayaṉ and his brother Aṅgi, received the land and undertook the responsibility of getting the ceremony performed without fail. It is also stated that they agreed to remit a fine of one mañjāḍi (of gold) on those days when they could not perform the ceremony.
Published in Āvaṇam, Vol. XIII p. 10-11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� svastiśrī . kacciyun tañcai
yuṅ koṇṭa śrī kannara devarkku yāṇṭu 23 Āva
tu puliyūṟkoṭṭattu cemparampākkattu śattiśva
rattu parameśvaraṟku trikālam śrībali koṭṭu
vatāka Ivūr kuḷattūr kiḻavaṉ nākaippe
rumāṉu mivan tampi niṟaikaliyum centa paṭṭaṉum
vaitta nilam vaṭapāleri kiṭakappaṟṟu Itaṉ
vaṭakkil ceṟuvu meṭṭuppaṭṭik kuḻiyum pu
ṟattāṉ pāḻeṅkaḷ pātiyu koṟṟaṉ cāt
taṉuḻavu miṭaippaḷḷattu kuṇṭilum muta
l vaṭṭa kaṇṇāṟṟuttaṭi Iraṇṭu mitippaḷḷa
kuṇṭilileṅkaḷ pātiyu muṉṟu paṭṭi E
ṅkaḷ kuḻi nānūṟṟu Irupatu tāmaraipaḷḷa
ttu Eṅkaḷ kūṟṟut talaiyaṭi nūṟu kuḻi
yu potukkaṇṇāṟṟuc ceṟuvileṅkaḷ
kūṟu kuḻi nūṟṟaiñcum Āka muvāyiraṅkuḻi
yu candrādittavaru mattaḷi Iraṇṭu paṭaka mo
ṉṟun tāḷamoṉṟu cekaṇṭi Oṉṟu Añcā
ṭ koṭṭuvatāka vaittom Ivvūrom Ibhu
miyāl vanta Iṟai Eppeṟpaṭṭatuṅ kāttu
k kuṭuppomāno mittaḷi Uṇṇāḻikai Uṭai
ya cempūti kiḻava Eḻuvāṭiyāṉu mivaṉiṟam
piRead mivaṉ ṟampikomayaṉumivaṉ ṟampi Aṅkiyum bhumi
koṇṭu śrībeli muṭṭāme koṭṭuvipomāno
m muṭṭin nāḷ mañcāṭip poṉ paṉmāhe
śvarar maṉṟa peṟuvatāka Oṭṭik kuṭuttār mi
dhanmattukku vighnañ ceyvār geṅgai Iṭai
kumari Iṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvattup paṭu
vār dhanmam rakṣippār śrīpādam Ee is written like ṉaṅkaḷ talai
mellina .
Digital edition of SII 32, appendix, no. 6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
